data_maps_VictoryRoad_B2F_text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_VitoIntro: I trained together with my whole family,\nevery one of us!\lI'm not losing to anyone!
data_maps_VictoryRoad_B2F_text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_VitoDefeat: Better than my family?!\nIs that possible?!
data_maps_VictoryRoad_B2F_text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_VitoPostBattle: I was better than everyone in my\nfamily. I've never lost before...\pI've lost my confidence...\nMaybe I'll go home...
data_maps_VictoryRoad_B2F_text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_OwenIntro: I'd heard that there was a tough\nlittle kid around. Do they mean you?
data_maps_VictoryRoad_B2F_text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_OwenPostBattle: The rumors I heard, that tough little\nkid is from PETALBURG CITY.
data_maps_VictoryRoad_B2F_text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_CarolineIntro: You must be getting a little tired.
data_maps_VictoryRoad_B2F_text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_CarolineDefeat: No signs of tiring at all!
data_maps_VictoryRoad_B2F_text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_CarolinePostBattle: VICTORY ROAD and the POKéMON LEAGUE\nare long and grueling challenges.\lBeware of fatigue!
data_maps_VictoryRoad_B2F_text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_JulieIntro: You shouldn't get complacent just\nbecause you have a lot of GYM BADGES.\pThere's always going to be someone\nwho's better than you!
data_maps_VictoryRoad_B2F_text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_JuliePostBattle: Gaze on your collected BADGES and\nremember the TRAINERS you've faced.
